title: Cuttable Wood
description: Makes wood blocks cuttable in the stonecutter, to make the crafting of wooden items more comfortable and sensible.
body:
## Features

In short, this adds stonecutting recipes for almost all wooden blocks. Some general things this datapack allows you to do:

- Use less wood crafting some wooden items (e.g. 1 plank -> 1 stair).
- Craft **fences and signs directly from logs**, without having to craft sticks first.
- **Repurpose items**, cutting them into smaller ones (e.g. doors into trapdoors; stairs into slabs, etc.).
- Convert **fences into fence gates and viceversa**.
- **Strip** huge amounts of wood faster than by hand.

**For a full-ish list of recipes, please [check my website](https://daenvil.github.io/MCDatapacks/cuttable_wood.html#recipe-summaries).** It would take too much space here.

There's an alternate, more over-powered version of this pack available for download in my website.

## Notes

- This datapack was designed to be as balanced as possible while making it make sense. No recipe should be exploitable to get free items/blocks.
- However, it is possible to slightly exploit the recipes to get "free" fuel. I nerfed this down as much as possible, but this is also the case in vanilla crafting recipes (for example, by crafting logs into slabs you get 4x fuel), so I decided to not get rid of the possibility alltogether.
- The recipes were also designed taking into account [Vanilla Tweak's _Back to Blocks_ datapack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/crafting-tweaks/), I recommend using that datapack along with this one to make the most efficient use of wooden blocks.
